mean_cn: adj.最初的，原始的，原来的；有独创性的，独创的
mean_en: existing at the beginning of a particular period, process or activity; new and interesting in a way that is different from anything that has existed before; able to produce new and interesting ideas; painted, written, etc. by the artist rather than copied
sentence: When I buy chips, I love original flavor.
sentence_trans: 我买薯片的时候，还是喜欢原味的。
word_etyma: origin起源 + al形容词后缀 → original原始的，独创的
